g.text: < 8 GPUs | Data Parallel | Simple, High Eff

ol.li: Volume: Comm volume scales with model size, not batch size.
Latency: All-reduce latency is O(N) for Ring topologies.
Compute Ratio: Small models hit the "Network Wall" sooner than large ones.

ul.li: Tₙ: Execution time on N GPUs
N: Number of GPUs in cluster
